sentences.arabic: يَتَطَلَّبُ بَدْءُ مَشْرُوعٍ تِجَارِيٍّ جَدِيدٍ مَزِيجًا مِنَ الشَّجَاعَةِ وَالتَّخْطِيطِ الدَّقِيقِ.
sentences.translation: Pokretanje novog poslovnog projekta zahtijeva spoj hrabrosti i preciznog planiranja.
sentences.translationEn: Starting a new business project requires a mixture of courage and meticulous planning.

sentences.arabic: يُوَاجِهُ الْعَدِيدُ مِنَ الرِّيَادِيِّينَ تَحَدِّيَاتٍ فِي الْمَرَاحِلِ الْأُولَى، مِثْلَ تَأْمِينِ التَّمْوِيلِ وَبِنَاءِ الْعَلَامَةِ التِّجَارِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi preduzetnici se suočavaju s izazovima u ranim fazama, kao što su osiguranje finansiranja i izgradnja brenda.
sentences.translationEn: Many entrepreneurs face challenges in the early stages, such as securing funding and building a brand.

sentences.arabic: وَمَعَ ذَلِكَ، يَبْقَى الِابْتِكَارُ هُوَ الْقُوَّةَ الدَّافِعَةَ الَّتِي تُمَيِّزُ الشَّرِكَاتِ النَّاشِئَةَ النَّاجِحَةَ عَنْ غَيْرِهَا.
sentences.translation: Ipak, inovacija ostaje pokretačka snaga koja razlikuje uspješne startap kompanije od ostalih.
sentences.translationEn: However, innovation remains the driving force that distinguishes successful startups from others.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الضَّرُورِيِّ إِجْرَاءُ تَحْلِيلٍ شَامِلٍ لِلسُّوقِ لِفَهْمِ احْتِيَاجَاتِ الْجُمْهُورِ الْمُسْتَهْدَفِ.
sentences.translation: Neophodno je sprovesti sveobuhvatnu analizu tržišta kako bi se razumjele potrebe ciljne publike.
sentences.translationEn: It is essential to conduct a comprehensive market analysis to understand the needs of the target audience.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الصَّبْرَ وَالْمُثَابَرَةَ هُمَا مِفْتَاحَا النَّجَاحِ طَوِيلِ الْأَمَدِ فِي عَالَمِ رِيَادَةِ الْأَعْمَالِ.
sentences.translation: Strpljenje i upornost su ključevi dugoročnog uspjeha u svijetu preduzetništva.
sentences.translationEn: Patience and perseverance are the keys to long-term success in the world of entrepreneurship.
